title: Aureline beta standards/interchange matrix
description: Boundary schema for the machine-readable beta standards/interchange matrix at artifacts/governance/standards_interchange_matrix_beta.json. The matrix is a typed projection of the canonical register at artifacts/governance/standards_matrix.yaml: one row per standard or interchange format, with the support posture, import/export expectation, version range, deviation policy, owner, and evidence paths that downstream surfaces consume. The markdown pages docs/governance/m3/standards_interchange_matrix.md and docs/architecture/standards_interchange_matrix.md are the human view; this machine matrix is the gated source of truth and ci/check_beta_interchange_matrix.py fails if the docs and the machine matrix drift or a row lacks a posture. The matrix is generated from the register; edit the register and regenerate rather than hand-editing this artifact.

schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the machine matrix. Bumped only on breaking payload changes.

support_posture.description: How Aureline relates to the named standard at this milestone. Mirrors support_class_classes in the register.

import_expectation.description: What Aureline consumes in the standard's shape. Mirrors import_expectation_classes in the register.

export_expectation.description: What Aureline emits in the standard's shape. Mirrors export_expectation_classes in the register.

deviation_policy.description: The posture the matrix commits to when the standard is not adopted verbatim. Mirrors deviation_policy_classes in the register.

path_ref.description: Repo-relative path or document reference consumers treat as opaque text.

row_id.description: Stable register row id, e.g. standard.sarif. Matches the id in standards_matrix.yaml.

standard_surface.description: Human-readable standard or interchange surface name.

domain.description: Domain class the row governs, drawn from domain_classes in the register.

version_range.description: Preferred-standard version range Aureline treats as canonical for this row.

owner_dri.description: Directly responsible individual for the posture.

compatibility_window_class.description: Compatibility-window class drawn from compatibility_window_classes in the register.

evidence_paths.description: Minimum-evidence path classes that prove the posture. Non-placeholder rows must list at least one.

standard_shaped_rows.description: Rows whose posture is a live standard-shaped interoperability claim.

bridge_rows.description: Rows with a custom-but-mirrorable or custom-with-bridge-planned posture; not a conformance claim.

deferred_or_declined_rows.description: Rows with a deferred-placeholder or declined-with-rationale posture; not a live claim.

matrix_id.description: Stable identifier for the matrix artifact.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp the matrix was generated. Normalized away when comparing for drift.

human_view_refs.description: Markdown human-view pages that must agree with this machine matrix.

support_posture_classes.description: Closed support-posture vocabulary the rows draw from.

rows.description: One row per standard or interchange format.
